name: Results view shows analytics and guarded publishing controls
description: With at least one seeded or previously created campaign, verify that the Results tab renders the current attribution, modeled revenue, and integration controls without publishing anything.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and go to the Campaigns view.
Open the first campaign in the list, or use the campaign that is already active.
Switch to the campaign's Results tab.
Verify that the Results tab renders without a blank screen, browser error, or stuck loading state.
Verify that Publish all and Sync GA4 controls are visible for the lead member, or that a clear no-published-posts empty state is visible.
Verify that performance tiles are visible, including Impressions, Clicks, Signups, Activated, Paid, and Modeled pipeline when data exists.
Verify that the attribution sections render when data exists: Where signups come from, Funnel by platform, Which platform converts best, Momentum, and Modeled revenue by platform.
If the Value per signup slider is visible, move it to a different value.
Verify that Modeled pipeline and modeled revenue update after the Value per signup slider changes.
Verify that Route wins to your stack shows Linear and Webhook options, and their send buttons remain disabled until a key or URL is entered.
